caption: General legend
text: Abbreviation Meaning General legend A,B Link X into Y. This is done by pressing X, then Y after the recovery frames of X. A > B Cancel A into B. During A's animation, press B to cancel. (N) Multi-hit move hits only N times. Omitted if all hits are used. xN Normal that chains into itself pressed N times [X] Hold down X ]X[ Release X X~Y X then Y done in quick succession X/Y X or Y Fastfall Cancelling an air normal into another move to change momentum and land early. The 2nd move is land cancelled during startup. Kara Quickly cancelling a move into another move before it becomes active. This is done for positioning or to access airborne specials from grounded attacks. OTG Following move hits off the ground CH Counter hit j. Prefix an attack command with j. to indicate it must be performed in the air. "nj." means neutral jump only. jc Jump cancel dl Delay TK Tiger knee (doing an air move the moment a jump sends you airborne, typically by inputting a special move motion followed by jump+button.) whiff / (w) Indicates that the move must not hit the opponent. (move) Indicates that the move is optional in a sequence. 236 214 623 421 [4]6 (hold), [2]8 (hold), 360

rows.text: Link X into Y. This is done by pressing X, then Y after the recovery frames of X.
rows.html: Link X into Y. This is done by pressing X, then Y after the recovery frames of X.

rows.text: Cancel A into B. During A's animation, press B to cancel.
rows.html: Cancel A into B. During A's animation, press B to cancel.

rows.text: Multi-hit move hits only N times. Omitted if all hits are used.
rows.html: Multi-hit move hits only N times. Omitted if all hits are used.

rows.text: Normal that chains into itself pressed N times
rows.html: Normal that chains into itself pressed N times

rows.text: X then Y done in quick succession
rows.html: X then Y done in quick succession

rows.text: Cancelling an air normal into another move to change momentum and land early. The 2nd move is land cancelled during startup.
rows.html: Cancelling an air normal into another move to change momentum and land early. The 2nd move is land cancelled during startup.

rows.text: Quickly cancelling a move into another move before it becomes active. This is done for positioning or to access airborne specials from grounded attacks.
rows.html: Quickly cancelling a move into another move before it becomes active. This is done for positioning or to access airborne specials from grounded attacks.

rows.text: Following move hits off the ground
Prefix an attack command with j. to indicate it must be performed in the air. "nj." means neutral jump only.
rows.html: Prefix an attack command with j. to indicate it must be performed in the air. "nj." means neutral jump only.

rows.text: Tiger knee (doing an air move the moment a jump sends you airborne, typically by inputting a special move motion followed by jump+button.)
rows.html: Tiger knee (doing an air move the moment a jump sends you airborne, typically by inputting a special move motion followed by jump+button.)

rows.text: Indicates that the move must not hit the opponent.
rows.html: Indicates that the move must not hit the opponent.

rows.text: Indicates that the move is optional in a sequence.
